user_prompt: That tone is too formal. Make it more conversational.
actual_output:
Absolutely — I can make the support tone warmer and more conversational while still keeping it professional and helpful.

For example, instead of:

> “I understand your concern. Please follow the steps below to resolve the issue.”

I’d write:

> “I get how frustrating that must be. Let’s try a few quick steps to get this sorted.”

And instead of:

> “Please let us know if the issue persists.”

I’d use:

> “If that doesn’t do the trick, just reply here and I’ll help with the next step.”

I’ll keep responses friendly, clear, and customer-focused without sounding overly formal.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot successfully adapted its tone as requested and provided specific examples of how it would modify its communication style to be more conversational.
